confirmations.unsavedChanges: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to close?
confirmations.delete: Do you want to delete this level? This can be undone later.
confirmations.hide: Do you want to hide this level?
confirmations.unhide: Do you want to unhide this level?
confirmations.restore: Do you want to restore this level?
confirmations.permanentDelete: Permanently delete this level? This cannot be undone. All passes, ratings, and stored files (download and curation images) will be removed.

errors.cannotCreateSong: Cannot create new songs from level edit. Please select an existing song.

xaccCurve.title: Xacc score curve
xaccCurve.hint: Set two interior score pins (95% is fixed at base score). A hyperbola is fitted through all three points; derived E and G are shown below.
xaccCurve.constraintHint: If pins cannot be fit exactly, the last E/G curve is kept and pins may appear off the plotted line.
xaccCurve.fitWarning: Pins do not lie on a single hyperbola with the last E/G: {{error}}. Markers show your values; adjust pins or scores to fit.
xaccCurve.baseScoreFallback: Level base score is missing; pin scores use {{base}} for scaling.
xaccCurve.tilecountFallback: Tile count is missing; preview uses 100 tiles.
xaccCurve.toastSavedWithPasses: Xacc curve saved. {{count}} pass scores recalculated.

errors.fit: Could not fit a valid hyperbola to these pins

chartStats.title: Chart metadata
chartStats.openButtonTitle: Edit BPM, tile count & length (non-CDN only)
chartStats.clearHint: Leave a field empty and save to clear that value.

errors.bpm: BPM must be a number greater than 0
errors.tilecount: Tile count must be a non-negative integer
errors.length: Length must be a non-negative number (seconds, decimals allowed)

tags.title: Manage Level Tags
tags.noResults: No tags found matching your search

download.title: Download Options
download.oversizedNotice: This level file is too large to support conversion. Only the original zip is available for download.

tooltips.dropEvents: Remove selected events and filters from the level
tooltips.keepEvents: Keep only the selected events and remove filters

errors.fileMissing: The file for this level is missing or corrupted on the server.
errors.reupload: Please reupload the level in the editing window.
errors.noBackup: No backup is available. Please contact an administrator.
